# Kyle Wu

Kyle Wu (Ping-Ju Wu, 吳秉儒) is a Taiwan-based FinTech builder working across product strategy, market analysis, digital finance, and AI-native software execution.

He is an incoming MSc Financial Technology student at Warwick Business School. His public work includes trading workflow automation and prediction-market execution research.

Primary site:
https://kylewu.me

Selected projects:
- Kaiyn Trading Bot: https://kylewu.me/projects/kaiyn-trading-bot
- Prediction Market Execution Lab: https://kylewu.me/projects/prediction-market-execution-lab

Public profiles:
- GitHub: https://github.com/kylekkkk61
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/kylewu0610/
- X: https://x.com/kylekkkkwu61
